what_it_does: Records a board_items attachment that links a dragnet-development channel-memory artifact to the board item board://item-5819b5a4, with a creation timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-5819b5a4.
The added timestamp includes an explicit UTC offset.
standouts: Typed attachment metadata linking channel memory to a board item via a board:// URI.
Empty body means the record is purely a structured reference/provenance stub.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Target identifiers use a board:// URI scheme.
concerns: No contextual explanation of why this attachment exists.
The board:// target cannot be resolved from this file alone.
notes: This is a minimal, timestamped ledger entry that creates a typed cross-reference from a channel-memory artifact to a board item.
questions: What content or decision does board item item-5819b5a4 represent?
What dragnet-development artifact is being attached?
Is the attachment meant to be bidirectional or indexed elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment, and the file does exactly that; purpose matches actual content.
intention_signals: It appears designed to establish a durable, typed link between a channel memory record and a project board item so the relationship can be queried or surfaced in a fused system.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as the target of an attachment record.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped cross-reference between a channel-memory artifact and a board item, preserving linkage provenance without embedding the target's content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel-memory attachment record of type board_items linking dragnet-development to board://item-5819b5a4 with a UTC timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a dragnet-development channel-memory artifact is associated with board item item-5819b5a4.
